Saint-Martin Belgian Dubbel - Four Fathers Brewing Co.
Rich malt, raisins, sweetness, dark stone fruits, plums.
sweet, light bodied, slight warming from the alcohol content.
A traditional Belgian style Abbey Dubbel.
First brewed by trappist monks in Belgium this is a fairly traditional example of the style.
Uses Belgian Candi Syrup (beet sugar syrup) to lighten body, and boost alcohol and flavour.
